name: Fudgy Brownies (Quaker)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate pieces and butter over hot (not boiling) water.
2. Beat the eggs until light and fluffy; gradually beat in sugar.
3. Stir in the oats, baking powder, salt, vanilla, walnuts, and melted chocolate mixture.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 30 to 35 minutes.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. Cut into squares. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar, if desired.
